entities.name: CORN
entities.description: Zea mays L., the crop studied for yield and nutrient uptake

entities.name: NITROGEN USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which nitrogen is used by the plant, including agronomic NUE and apparent N recovery efficiency

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of the corn crop

entities.name: NITROGEN UPTAKE
entities.description: The amount of nitrogen absorbed by the corn plant

entities.name: SULFUR UPTAKE
entities.description: The amount of sulfur absorbed by the corn plant

entities.name: SULFUR AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The availability of sulfur in the soil, influenced by source and application rate

entities.name: SULFUR APPLICATION RATE
entities.description: The amount of sulfur applied to the soil, ranging from 25% to 125% of the recommended rate

entities.name: NITROGEN APPLICATION RATE
entities.description: The site-specific recommended rate of nitrogen applied to the crop

entities.name: FIELD STUDY
entities.description: A research study conducted over 2020-2022 across six locations in three countries

entities.name: UNITED STATES
entities.description: One of the countries where the field study was conducted

entities.name: GHANA
entities.description: One of the countries where the field study was conducted

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: One of the countries where the field study was conducted

entities.name: MICRONIZED ELEMENTAL SULFUR
entities.description: A sulfur source with a specific bioavailability level

entities.name: UNTREATED ELEMENTAL SULFUR
entities.description: A sulfur source with a specific bioavailability level

entities.name: AMMONIUM SULFATE
entities.description: A sulfur source with a specific bioavailability level

entities.name: NITROGEN FERTILIZER
entities.description: The source of nitrogen applied to the soil to enhance crop growth
